title: Games to Keep
shortDescription: Games to Keep helps you find and keep track of free games from multiple sites, all in one place.
longDescription: Games to Keep is a website that lists free games from a range of sources like Epic Games, Steam, and more. It collects and displays active giveaways, so users can easily see what's available without checking every site individually.

title: Screen Diary
shortDescription: A Windows app that tracks how long your screen is active
longDescription: Screen Diary is a simple screen time tracker for Windows. It runs in the background and records how long your screen is on. It's lightweight, doesn't use a database, and avoids creating extra processes — just a clean way to keep track of your daily screen usage.

title: EWB 2025
longDescription: Developed by a team of second year Computer Science students, this project showcases practical software engineering skills while addressing a genuine social and environmental problem. This game is a turn-based multiplayer board game designed to tackle the real-world issue of potholes in Makers Valley, South Africa. By combining strategic gameplay with educational elements, the game encourages players to think critically about resource management, community impact, and sustainable solutions.
